data.title: US Jobless Claims Fall to Lowest Level Since 2022 as Labor Market Holds Firm
data.description:
The US labor market showed unexpected strength heading into the final month of 2025, with weekly unemployment insurance claims dropping to their lowest level in more than three years. According to data released at 8:30 A. M. ET on December 4, 2025, initial jobless claims fell sharply, signaling continued resilience despite broader economic uncertainty
source: https://www.ethnews.com/us-jobless-claims-fall-to-lowest-level-since-2022-as-labor-market-holds-firm/

data.title: Best Crypto Presale to Buy Now: Bitcoin Hyper Supercharges Bitcoin with Layer 2 Scalability
data.description:
What to Know: Bitcoin’s Layer 1 is highly secure but limited by slow throughput, high fees, and no native smart contracts, restricting payments, DeFi, and everyday on-chain activity. Demand is rising for a system that pairs Bitcoin-level trust with Solana-grade speed, creating a clear market gap for scalable, programmable Bitcoin Layer-2 solutions like Bitcoin Hyper. Bitcoin Hyper launches a high-performance Bitcoin Layer 2 with SVM integration, enabling faster-than-Solana execution for wrapped BTC across payments, DeFi, NFTs, and more. With ultra-low-latency processing and SVM smart contracts, Bitcoin Hyper aims to transform idle $BTC into a productive asset powering dApps, gaming, and high-speed on-chain ecosystems
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/best-crypto-to-buy-bitcoin-hyper-presale-brings-bitcoin-layer-2-scalability/

data.title: U.S. Weekly Jobless Claims Drop Below Expectations
data.description: According to Odaily, the number of initial jobless claims in the United States for the week ending November 29 decreased to 191,000. This figure is below the market's general expectation of 220,000 and also lower than the previous week's count of 218,000.

data.title: Chicago Fed Predicts Stable U.S. Unemployment Rate for November
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the Chicago Federal Reserve anticipates that the unemployment rate in the United States will remain steady at approximately 4.4% for November.

data.title: Coinbase Plugs Crypto Into US Mega Banks: Is $PEPENODE the Next 1000x Crypto?
data.description:
What to Know: Coinbase connecting stablecoin and custody rails to major US banks could accelerate institutional flows into crypto while normalizing tokenized dollars in tradfi. As infrastructure institutionalizes, speculative capital historically migrates down the risk curve into higher-volatility narratives like memecoins and gamified yield experiments. PEPENODE’s mine-to-earn model gamifies virtual mining, removing hardware complexity while front-loading incentives for early participants via tiered node rewards. Mine-to-earn and virtual mining designs highlight a broader shift from passive staking dashboards toward interactive, game-like front ends for on-chain yield and speculation
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/coinbase-plugs-crypto-in-us-mega-banks-pepenode-next-1000x-crypto/

data.title: CZ Outlines Bitcoin’s Real-World Utility as Peter Schiff Defends Gold in High-Stakes Debate at Binance Blockchain Week Dubai
data.description: The headline debate of Binance Blockchain Week Dubai — “Gold vs. Bitcoin” featuring Binance Founder CZ and long-time gold advocate Peter Schiff — delivered a sharp ideological contrast between traditional monetary thinking and the realities of digital value in 2025.Across 40 minutes of fast-paced argument, CZ consistently anchored his case in real-world adoption, infrastructure growth, and user utility, while Schiff leaned on historic monetary theory and gold’s physical properties.The result: a debate that left clear momentum on the side of Bitcoin’s future, not gold’s past.CZ: Bitcoin Has Proven Utility — and Hundreds of Millions Already Rely on ItCZ opened by addressing a core misconception: Bitcoin’s lack of physical form does not mean it lacks value.“Value is not determined by physical properties. Google, X, software — all are intangible, yet essential. Bitcoin is the most secure, transparent monetary network ever built.”He emphasized Bitcoin’s predictable, fully auditable supply, contrasting it with gold:“We literally do not know how much gold exists.With Bitcoin, we know exactly how much there is and where it is. It is the only truly finite asset humans have.”CZ also highlighted the global community supporting Bitcoin:Nearly 300 million users on Binance aloneMillions using BTC, stablecoins, and crypto rails for paymentsA rapidly expanding developer ecosystemReal-world utility across emerging marketsHe shared a compelling story from a Binance user in Africa who reduced bill payments from three days to three minutes using crypto.“That is material utility. That is life-changing. That is value.”Schiff: Bitcoin Is “Speculation,” Not Money — But Offers No Alternative for Digital MobilityPeter Schiff argued that Bitcoin lacks intrinsic value because it lacks industrial use. He described it as:“A speculative digital collectible people only buy because they think it will go up.”Schiff repeatedly repeated textbook definitions of money — unit of account, medium of exchange — arguing Bitcoin doesn’t qualify.But CZ countered with data from the ecosystem:“Money is what people choose to use. Hundreds of millions already use Bitcoin as money — directly or through cards, wallets, and merchants. Adoption defines money more than academic definitions.”Schiff’s counterarguments remained rooted in theoretical objections rather than adoption metrics, often overlooking that today’s monetary infrastructure is already digital.CZ Demonstrates Bitcoin Payments Live — Schiff Says It “Doesn’t Count”To challenge the claim that crypto isn’t used in payments, CZ held up a Binance Visa card.“You can pay anywhere Visa is accepted. Users spend crypto directly.The merchant receives fiat — problem solved.”Usage numbers:Millions of active Binance card usersTens of millions of crypto payment transactions processedMerchants do not need to integrate crypto directlySchiff dismissed it as “selling Bitcoin for dollars,” but CZ clarified the point:“It works. Users use crypto. Merchants get paid. That is utility.”The crowd overwhelmingly sided with CZ in recognizing this as real-world crypto usage.On Value: CZ Argues Bitcoin Has Outperformed Every Asset for 15 YearsSchiff claimed Bitcoin underperformed gold in gold-terms over a four-year window.CZ responded with the broader historical reality:Bitcoin has outperformed every major asset class since inceptionBitcoin has become a $2 trillion assetAdoption has grown from zero to hundreds of millions globallyBitcoin continues to see increasing real-world and institutional integration“Value is not determined by one handpicked time period. The long-term trajectory is clear.”The audience reaction made clear which viewpoint resonated.CZ on Altcoins vs. Bitcoin: Community + Adoption = Real ValueWhen Schiff implied new tokens dilute Bitcoin’s position, CZ reframed the argument:“Anyone can issue a token — but utility and community cannot be copied.Bitcoin is backed by millions of people. That is why it has value.”This distinction — technology vs. adoption — became one of CZ’s strongest points of the debate.Future Generations: CZ Says Bitcoin Wins; Schiff Says They Will Reject ItWhen asked what the next generation will prefer, CZ answered confidently:“Young people understand digital value. Bitcoin is global, mobile, and censorship-resistant.It is built for their world — not the old one.”Schiff predicted young investors will “learn the hard way,” but the audience laughter suggested otherwise.Digital Gold vs. Physical Gold: The Debate Ends with a Surprise TwistThough they disagreed on nearly everything, the session ended with unexpected collaboration:CZ invited Schiff to bring his tokenized gold project to Binance.Schiff accepted the idea — and even suggested Binance should be an issuer.CZ closed with a statement firmly aligned with the conference’s forward-looking tone:“Gold will do well. Bitcoin will do better. And both can coexist.But Bitcoin is the future.”

data.description: According to TechFlow, on December 4, a whale address identified as 0x97BD withdrew 10,000 ETH from a centralized exchange (CEX) two hours ago, as monitored by the on-chain analysis platform Lookonchain. The total holdings of this address now amount to 34,188 ETH.

data.title: Sovereign Wealth Funds Increase Bitcoin Holdings Amid Price Decline
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, BlackRock CEO Larry Fink has revealed that several sovereign wealth funds are purchasing Bitcoin during its recent price drop. Fink noted that these funds are gradually buying Bitcoin as its price fell from a peak of $126,000, with increased acquisitions occurring when the price reached the $80,000 range. The aim is to establish long-term positions.

Fink emphasized the importance of the U.S. accelerating its investments in digitalization and tokenization to avoid falling behind other countries. He also predicted significant growth in tokenization driven by cryptocurrencies in the coming years.

data.title: Valour to Launch Four Digital Asset ETPs on Brazil's B3 Exchange
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, DeFi Technologies Inc. has announced that its subsidiary, Valour, has received approval from Brazil's B3 Exchange to list four digital asset exchange-traded products (ETPs). The products include Valour Bitcoin (BTCV), Valour Ethereum (ETHV), Valour XRP (XRPV), and Valour SUI (VSUI). Trading for these ETPs is expected to commence on December 17.

data.title: MicroStrategy's Stock Shows Rare Bullish Reversal Signal Amid Market Dynamics
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, MicroStrategy's stock, MSTR, has exhibited a rare bullish reversal signal known as the "Abandoned Baby" on its daily chart. This technical pattern suggests that the ongoing downtrend may be losing momentum, potentially paving the way for a sharp rebound. The Abandoned Baby pattern is characterized by three candles: a long bearish candle, a small indecision candle that gaps lower, and a strong bullish candle that gaps higher, leaving the middle candle "abandoned." Analysts have noted the rarity and reliability of this pattern, likening it to a "unicorn" in market analysis.

The emergence of the Abandoned Baby pattern follows a multimonth downtrend for MSTR, during which its stock price fell approximately 66% from its 2025 peak, reaching $155.61 on Monday. However, the stock has since rebounded by around 22.50%, driven by a recovery in the Bitcoin market and increasing expectations of a Federal Reserve rate cut in December. This macroeconomic backdrop has bolstered the bullish outlook for MSTR, with traders identifying multiple technical confirmations supporting this view.

Analyst Lark Davis has pointed out the presence of a hammer candle near the lows and an oversold relative strength index (RSI), both indicators of seller exhaustion and a potential shift in risk-reward dynamics favoring buyers. Options trader Brando has predicted an "aggressive move back above 200," and potentially even 280, contingent on the continuation of favorable macro and technical conditions. He emphasized that MicroStrategy has reached a point where the risk-to-reward ratio is increasingly favorable, noting the prevalent bearish sentiment surrounding the stock as a potential opportunity.

Despite the optimistic outlook, downside risks persist, particularly if Bitcoin experiences renewed volatility or if expectations for a December rate cut diminish. Such scenarios could adversely impact MSTR, especially if spot ETF inflows decrease. Investors are advised to conduct their own research and exercise caution, as every investment and trading decision carries inherent risks.
